6.1.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA)
6.1.snippet: An Act to govern the collection, use and disclosure of personal data by organisations. Section 26 governs cross-border data transfers.

6.1.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2021 — Transfer Limitation Obligation
6.1.snippet: Prescribes requirements for cross-border data transfers under Section 26 of the PDPA, including  contractual safeguards and certification.

6.1.title: Comprehensive And Progressive Agreement For Trans-Pacific Partnership - Singapore
6.1.snippet: Not in agreement with binding commitments on data transfer

6.1.title: Korea-Singapore Digital Partnership Agreement (Ksdpa)
6.1.snippet: Not in agreement with binding commitments on data transfer

6.1.title: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement - Singapore
6.1.snippet: Not in agreement with binding commitments on data transfer

6.2.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA)
6.2.snippet: An Act to govern the collection, use and disclosure of personal data. No explicit data localization requirement — conditional transfer regime only.

6.3.title: Cybersecurity Act 2018
6.3.snippet: An Act to require cybersecurity information sharing and to establish the Cybersecurity Agency of Singapore. Covers critical information infrastructure.

6.3.title: IMDA Advisory Guidelines on Cloud Services and Data Centres
6.3.snippet: Advisory guidelines on cloud services and data centre requirements in Singapore.

6.3.title: Code Of Practice For Competition In The Provision Of Telecommunication And Media Services 2022 Issued By Infocomm Media Development Authority (Imda)
Telecommunications Act 1999

6.4.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA) — Section 26
6.4.snippet: Section 26 establishes a conditional flow regime requiring comparable protection for cross-border data transfers.

6.4.title: PDPC Guide to Cross-Border Data Transfers
6.4.snippet: Guidance on the Transfer Limitation Obligation under the PDPA for cross-border data transfers.
